Short CV

Liwu MA was born in CHINA. Liwu MA completed his bachelor’s degree in Chinese Language and Literature at Northwest Institute in 1984. After his undergraduate education, Liwu MA completed his master's degree in Arab History at Peking University in 1992. Currently, Liwu MA is working as a Lecturer in Foreign Languages at Üsküdar University, Department of Common Courses.
